---
title: An overview of the R language
author: 
  - Norah Jones
  - Bill Gates
  - Luis Francisco Gomez
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: load-libraries-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
```

# Introduction

Pending

# Import data

Pending

```{r}
#| message: false
satisfaction_data <- read_csv(file = "../000_data/002_data_set_chapter-2.csv")
```

# Transform data

Pending

```{r}
satisfaction_data <- satisfaction_data |> 
  mutate(
    Segment = factor(x = Segment, ordered = FALSE)
  )
```

# Summary statistics

Pending

```{r}
satisfaction_data |> 
  skim()
```
